<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="y-uKtFNfZFEA8ZQEyfH4"> <mxGraphModel dx="1316" dy="-366" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-24" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h1 data-section-id="1m23g63" data-start="0" data-end="50">Terraform Plan — What Happens Behind the Scenes?</h1><p data-start="52" data-end="141"><font style="font-size: 15px;"><b><code data-start="52" data-end="68" style="">terraform plan</code> </b>is used to preview the changes Terraform will make before applying them.</font></p><p data-start="52" data-end="141"><font style="font-size: 15px;"><strong data-start="145" data-end="159" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Important:</strong><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"> </span><code data-start="160" data-end="176" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">terraform plan</code><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"> does not create, update, or delete any resources. It only shows what Terraform intends to do.</span></font></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="154" width="805" x="16" y="1579" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-25" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<font style="font-size: 18px;"><b>What Happens When We Run <code data-start="304" data-end="320" style="">terraform plan</code>?</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55.23" width="534" x="16" y="1729" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="<h2 data-section-id="pft4u0" data-start="356" data-end="397"><font style="font-size: 16px;">1. Terraform Reads Configuration Files</font></h2><p data-start="399" data-end="464"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Terraform scans all configuration files in the current directory.</font></p><h3 data-section-id="1ccb0jl" data-start="466" data-end="480"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Files Read</font></h3><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="482" data-end="542"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><font style="font-size: 14px;">main.tf<br>variables.tf<br>outputs.tf<br>terraform.tfvars</font></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-26"> <mxCell parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="195" width="751.28" x="14" y="1742" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-27" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=13;" value="<h3 data-section-id="13kuw9j" data-start="544" data-end="567">What Terraform Does</h3><ul data-start="569" data-end="679"><li data-section-id="u06qjt" data-start="569" data-end="590">Parses <code data-start="578" data-end="583">.tf</code> files.<br></li><li data-section-id="1mjhwey" data-start="591" data-end="610">Validates syntax.<br></li><li data-section-id="zbyc9f" data-start="611" data-end="640">Loads variables and locals.<br></li><li data-section-id="zz2zrc" data-start="641" data-end="679">Builds an internal dependency graph.</li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126.77" width="383.57" x="14" y="1926" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-28" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;" value="<h2 data-section-id="lgpmc2" data-start="686" data-end="711">2. Loads Current State</h2><p data-start="713" data-end="775">Terraform reads the current state from the configured backend.</p><h3 data-section-id="16zgw4u" data-start="777" data-end="788">Example</h3><p data-start="790" data-end="818">If backend is Azure Storage:</p><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="820" data-end="867"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="relative h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class=""><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>terraform {</span><br><span> backend "azurerm" {}</span><br><span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180.39" width="500" x="14" y="2046" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-29" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<p data-start="869" data-end="887"><font style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Terraform fetches:</b></font></p><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="889" data-end="918"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>terraform.tfstate</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class=""></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre><p data-start="920" data-end="944">from the remote backend.</p><h3 data-section-id="z5q4pk" data-start="946" data-end="957"><font style="font-size: 15px;">Purpose</font></h3><p data-start="959" data-end="1008">To understand what infrastructure already exists.</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="385.16" x="413" y="2081" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-30" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="1ysnzc3" data-start="1015" data-end="1051"><font style="font-size: 19px;">3. Refreshes Infrastructure State</font></h2><p data-start="1053" data-end="1128"><font style="font-size: 15px;">Terraform contacts the cloud provider and checks the actual infrastructure.</font></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="464" x="8" y="2275" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-31" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<p data-start="1194" data-end="1215"><font style="font-size: 15px;"><b>Terraform asks Azure:</b></font></p><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="1217" data-end="1276"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute end-1.5 top-1 z-2 md:end-2 md:top-1"></div><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>Does vm-prod still exist?</span><br><span>Has anything changed?</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="128" width="332" x="428" y="2284" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-33" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="iuxre" data-start="1398" data-end="1425"><font style="font-size: 21px;">4. Compares Three Things</font></h2><p data-start="1427" data-end="1446"><font style="font-size: 16px;">Terraform compares:</font></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="462" x="10" y="2379" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-34" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<h3 data-section-id="10gyd7d" data-start="1448" data-end="1465"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Desired State</font></h3><p data-start="1467" data-end="1491">What is written in code.</p><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="1493" data-end="1598"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="relative h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4"><div class="pointer-events-none sticky z-40 shrink-0 z-1!"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light"></div></div></div><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class=""><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>resource "azurerm_resource_group" "rg" {</span><br><span> name = "prod-rg"</span><br><span> location = "Central India"</span><br><span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="144" width="292" x="10" y="2475" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-35" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<h3 data-section-id="1jj3kbc" data-start="1600" data-end="1617">Current State</h3><p data-start="1619" data-end="1634">What exists in:</p><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="1636" data-end="1665"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>terraform.tfstate</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="141" width="140" x="319.64" y="2478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-36" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;" value="<h3 data-section-id="mi1lb" data-start="1667" data-end="1692">Actual Infrastructure</h3>
<p data-start="1694" data-end="1733">What currently exists in Azure/AWS/GCP.</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="139" width="284" x="503" y="2478" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-37" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="4xl9ud" data-start="1979" data-end="2009">5. Builds an Execution Plan</h2><p data-start="2011" data-end="2046">Terraform generates a plan showing:</p><h3 data-section-id="1n6sfgb" data-start="2048" data-end="2068">Create Resources</h3><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="2070" data-end="2090"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>+ create</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class=""></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre><h3 data-section-id="ax1366" data-start="2092" data-end="2112">Update Resources</h3><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="2114" data-end="2143"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>~ update in-place</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class=""></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre><h3 data-section-id="1jp5afn" data-start="2145" data-end="2166">Replace Resources</h3><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="2168" data-end="2204"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>-/+ destroy and recreate</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class=""></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre><h3 data-section-id="ct89t2" data-start="2206" data-end="2226">Delete Resources</h3><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="2228" data-end="2249"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>- destroy</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="304.73" width="602.15" x="10" y="2628" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-38" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h1 data-section-id="o2vtnd" data-start="2687" data-end="2701">Plan Summary</h1>
<p data-start="2703" data-end="2730">At the end Terraform shows:</p>
<pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="2732" data-end="2786"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="relative h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-4 top-12 bottom-4"><div class="pointer-events-none sticky z-40 shrink-0 z-1!"><div class="sticky bg-token-border-light"></div></div></div><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class=""><div class="relative"><div class=""><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span>Plan: </span><span class="ͼj">2</span><span> to add, </span><span class="ͼj">1</span><span> to change, </span><span class="ͼj">0</span><span> to destroy.</span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="291" width="413" x="368" y="2628" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-39" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="1rt9wyf" data-start="2892" data-end="2923">6. Dependency Graph Creation</h2><p data-start="2925" data-end="2961">Terraform builds a dependency graph.</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="276" x="8" y="2949" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-40" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2 data-section-id="89fpr6" data-start="3266" data-end="3299">7. Exit Without Making Changes</h2><p data-start="3301" data-end="3337"><font style="font-size: 16px;">After generating the execution plan:</font></p><pre class="overflow-visible! px-0!" data-start="3339" data-end="3381"><div class="relative w-full mt-4 mb-1"><div class=""><div class="contents"><div class="relative"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="h-full min-h-0 min-w-0"><div class="border border-token-border-light border-radius-3xl corner-superellipse/1.1 rounded-3xl"><div class="h-full w-full border-radius-3xl bg-token-bg-elevated-secondary corner-superellipse/1.1 overflow-clip rounded-3xl lxnfua_clipPathFallback"><div class="relative"><div class="pe-11 pt-3"><div class="relative z-0 flex max-w-full"><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr" class="q9tKkq_viewer cm-editor z-10 light:cm-light dark:cm-light flex h-full w-full flex-col items-stretch ͼd ͼr"><div class="cm-scroller"><pre class="cm-content q9tKkq_readonly m-0"><code><span><font style="font-size: 16px;">No infrastructure is modified.</font></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class=""><div class=""></div></div></div></div></div></div></pre><p data-start="3383" data-end="3463"><font style="font-size: 16px;">Terraform simply displays the actions that would occur during <code data-start="3445" data-end="3462" style="">terraform apply</code>.</font></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="232" width="458" x="311.0009977839541" y="2868.99508206881" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nk_OZF4UCcfvJzuxiXf4-41" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h1 data-section-id="hvlibx" data-start="4746" data-end="4764"><font style="font-size: 26px;">One-Line Summary</font></h1><blockquote data-start="4766" data-end="5031" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node=""><p data-start="4768" data-end="5031" data-is-last-node=""><strong data-start="4768" data-end="5031" data-is-last-node=""><font style="font-size: 18px;"><code data-start="4770" data-end="4786" style="">terraform plan</code> reads the Terraform configuration, state file, and actual infrastructure, compares them, and generates an execution plan showing what resources will be created, updated, replaced, or destroyed—without making any changes to the infrastructure.</font></strong></p></blockquote>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="205" width="790" x="10" y="3031" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.h1: Terraform Plan — What Happens Behind the Scenes?

p.font: terraform plan is used to preview the changes Terraform will make before applying them.

font.span: does not create, update, or delete any resources. It only shows what Terraform intends to do.

p.font: Terraform simply displays the actions that would occur during terraform apply.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 788px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1459px; margin-left: 4px;

strong.font: terraform plan reads the Terraform configuration, state file, and actual infrastructure, compares them, and generates an execution plan showing what resources will be created, updated, replaced, or destroyed—without making any changes to the infrastructure.
